understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by positioning each selectable piece onto every goal tile (+) simultaneously in each level, achieving a WIN condition to complete the entire game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the selected piece in the specified direction by 3 pixels per cell, potentially pushing adjacent pushable blocks or being blocked by walls/objects; CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece at the exact target_position coordinates; walls and boundaries block movement variably, requiring trial to learn behaviors; multiple selectables require positioning all on goals at once for victory.
